Data Scientist — 4 years

Core Skills:
• Python (scikit-learn, pandas, NumPy, matplotlib, seaborn)
• Machine Learning: regression, classification, clustering, model evaluation
• Statistical Methods: A/B testing, hypothesis testing, cross-validation, feature engineering
• Data: SQL, ETL pipeline design, data visualization, Jupyter notebooks

Key Accomplishments:
• Built churn prediction classification model (scikit-learn) reducing attrition 18%
• Designed A/B testing framework for pricing experiments with rigorous hypothesis testing
• Delivered statistical modeling reports using pandas, NumPy, and matplotlib visualizations
• Automated ETL transformation pipeline processing 2M records daily
